-- 5 of 29 --

INCREASE CUSTOMER VALUE THROUGH SLM
SALES FUNNELS
Note: Since we now know that company able and willing to spend the most
amount of money to acquire a customer will always win
And
Sales Funnels are the only practical way to increase the value of each customer
and hence allow companies to spend more to acquire new customers
It Can Therefore Be Said:
THE COMPANY WITH THE BEST SALES FUNNEL ALWAYS WINS!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

FORMULA

5. Downsell Offer

-- 13 of 29 --

6. Funnel Follow Up
Thanks to our opt-in bribe and
retargeting pixels, we can now
follow up with customers who
haven’t converted to the next
step in the funnel and put them
into a follow up series to
increase the value of each
prospect who enters our funnel.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 20 of 29 --

3. BANNER RETARGETING
1. AN INTERNET USER 2. VISITS YOUR SITE
YOUR SITE
3. LEAVES YOUR SITE
4. LATER, AS THEY BROWSE THE INTERNET, YOUR
AD WILL DISPLAY ON OTHER SITES
YOUR
RETARGETING
AD HERE
5.YOUR RETARGETING
AD CAPTURES THEIR INTERNET
6. THE
INTERNET
USER THEN
CONVERTS
INTO A LOYAL
CUSTOMER
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 21 of 29 --

WEBSITE
VISITORS
CUSTOM
AUDIENCE
MATCH
MIKE MANNING
ROBERT BILL
PATTY BROWN
JOHN MORGAN
NICK STAN
PETER SMITH
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

WEB SURFER
YOUR SITE
USER LEAVES
USER IS
BROUGHT BACK
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
